content.full_text:
October 31, 2002

Mr. Ted Toppin  
California Association of Professional Scientists  
660 J Street, Suite 480  
Sacramento, CA 95814

Re: Your Request for Advice  
Our File No. W-02-266

Dear Mr. Toppin:

Pursuant to your telephone conversation with our office on October 29, 2002, this letter confirms that you are withdrawing your request for advice regarding the campaign contribution provisions of the Political Reform Act, as they pertain to Mr. David Miller’s candidacy for a seat on CalPERS’ board.

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca  
General Counsel

By: Kenneth L. Glick  
Counsel, Legal Division
